device_name: EPIQ Series Diagnostic Ultrasound System, Affiniti Series Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid flow analysis of the human body, with indications for use including Abdominal, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac other (Fetal), Cardiac Pediatric, Cerebral Vascular, Cepha
intended_use_full: diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid flow analysis of the human body, with indications for use including Abdominal, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac other (Fetal), Cardiac Pediatric, Cerebral Vascular, Cephalic (Adult), Cephalic (Neonatal), Fetal/Obstetric, Gynecological, Intraoperative (Vascular), Intraoperative (Cardiac), intra-luminal, intra-cardiac echo, Musculoskeletal (Conventional), Musculoskeletal (Superficial), Ophthalmic, Other: Urology, Pediatric, Peripheral Vessel, Small Organ (Breast, Thyroid, Testicle), Transesophageal (Cardiac), Transrectal, Transvaginal, Lung
target_condition: cardiac assessment requiring Doppler measurements during transthoracic echocardiography in adults
ground_truth: Group of measurements performed by Board certified cardiologists and cardiac sonographers following American Society of Echocardiography (ASE) guidelines for routine TTE cardiac exams at a large US-based hospital; ground truth touchscreens were determined by mapping Doppler waveforms to corresponding measurement touchscreen groups

recalls.reason: To provide clarification and labelling to define the useful life of ultrasound transducers in the field.
